title: The Straw Hats Inside a Giant Mystery
description: On pages 4–6, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Nami, Luffy, Unknown person #6, Usopp as The Straw Hats enter an unfamiliar Elbaf setting, encounter giant-scale mysteries, and begin separating the false world around them from the real island.
